name: Loanstar Title Loans
description_short: San Antonio's Loanstar Title Loans on SW Military Drive provides quick title loans and payday advances near the South Side shopping district.
description_long:
Loanstar Title Loans operates a standalone storefront at 1801 SW Military Drive in San Antonio, TX, serving the South Side community and surrounding neighborhoods. The location is positioned for easy access from South Texas commuters and locals seeking emergency financial solutions. This San Antonio branch maintains convenient hours for working residents in the area.

At this San Antonio location, customers can apply for title loans, payday loans, and other short-term financial products. The staff at the SW Military Drive office can be reached at 210-927-5444 to discuss loan options, eligibility requirements, and application processes. Loanstar title loans in San Antonio are processed quickly, with some approvals available on the same day.

For San Antonio residents on Military Drive or the South Side, Loanstar Title Loans offers a local option when unexpected expenses arise. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and vehicle documentation for title loans to expedite your application. This location provides accessible lending when you need it most.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Loans up to $10,000 available, higher than most payday alternative lenders
Multiple convenient San Antonio-area locations with consistent weekday and Saturday hours
Fast cash access described as a core benefit, typical of emergency title loans
Accepts multiple payment methods (cash, check, debit card, Western Union) for loan repayment
Published fee schedules for $600, $1,200, and $2,000 loans providing upfront cost transparency
Both single and multiple installment options available to match different repayment preferences
Online account management features including login, registration, and online payment capability
Licensed and regulated with OCCC notices displayed, indicating compliance oversight
cons: Vehicle title used as collateral—borrowers risk losing their car if unable to repay
APR and total finance charges not disclosed on main website; requires requesting individual loan disclosures
Title loans are inherently high-cost; no mention of APR caps or comparison to payday-alternatives category options
Limited information about loan terms, repayment periods, or rollover policies on the reviewed pages
No alternative products offered for those who may not own a vehicle or prefer unsecured borrowing
best_for: Vehicle owners facing genuine emergencies who need $1,000–$10,000 quickly and have no other credit options
Borrowers with poor credit who cannot qualify for personal loans or credit-based financing
San Antonio residents who value in-person service and same-day approval at a physical location
diagnosis: LoanStar Title Loans is best for vehicle owners in the San Antonio area who need emergency cash quickly and have exhausted other borrowing options. The primary caveat is that title loans carry high costs and collateral risk—borrowers must be confident they can repay to avoid losing their vehicle. Compare rates and terms with payday-alternative lenders (credit union PALs, CDFIs) before committing, as those options may offer lower APRs if you qualify.
services: Auto title loans (car title loans) up to $10,000
Online loan registration and account creation
In-person loan applications at physical storefronts
Payment acceptance via cash, check, debit card, and Western Union
Fee disclosures for $600, $1,200, and $2,000 loan amounts
Directions and location information for five San Antonio-area branches
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1801 SW Military Dr, San Antonio, TX 78221
meta_description: Loanstar Title Loans at 1801 SW Military Drive, San Antonio, TX. Same-day title loans and payday advances.
